$comment: Provar-specific structural reference for test case XML (top-level keys are Provar domain entities such as testCase/apiCalls, not JSON-Schema keywords). Despite the $schema declaration this is NOT a standards-compliant constraint JSON Schema; it is consumed as the provar://schema/test-step MCP resource and as the source for the validator's API-ID / value-class sets.
title: Provar Test Case XML Structure Schema
description: Complete mapping of Provar test case XML elements, apiCall types, and their required/optional arguments - organized by Test Palette categories

testCase.description: Root element of a Provar test case

params.description: Test case parameters for data-driven testing

args.description: Default argument values for test case parameters

apiCall.description: Generic apiCall element representing a test step
validation_rules: guid must be unique across all steps in test case
guid must be valid UUID v4 format
apiId must match a valid Provar API identifier
testItemId must be unique sequential integer starting from 1
apiCall.note: Every <apiCall> element MUST have a guid attribute - this is mandatory for Provar test case validation

apiCalls.description: All supported Provar test step types organized by Test Palette categories

Control.description: Control flow steps for loops, conditionals, assertions, and test flow management

AssertValues.description: Validate values using various comparison operators. IMPORTANT: actualValue can be empty for NotEqualTo blank string checks.

required_arguments.description: Actual value to compare. Can be empty for NotEqualTo blank string checks.
Type of comparison (EqualTo, NotEqualTo, Contains, GreaterThan, LessThan, etc.)

optional_arguments.description: Whether to treat values as numbers
Whether null is greater than non-null
Whether to match across multiple lines (for regex)
Whether dot matches all characters (for regex)

validation_rules: expectedValue and actualValue types should be compatible
comparisonType must be valid operator (EqualTo, NotEqualTo, Contains, NotContain, StartsWith, EndsWith, GreaterThan, LessThan, GreaterOrEqual, LessOrEqual, Matches, NotMatches)
For NotEqualTo blank string checks, actualValue can be empty
best_practices: Use specific comparison types rather than generic EqualTo
For blank string checks, use expectedValue={variable}, comparisonType='NotEqualTo', actualValue=<empty/>

Break.description: Exit from a loop (ForEach, While) prematurely
validation_rules: Must be inside a ForEach or While loop
best_practices: Use Break sparingly - consider loop conditions instead

Fail.description: Immediately fail the test with a message

Finally.description: Execute cleanup steps that always run regardless of test outcome
validation_rules: Should be at end of test
best_practices: Use for critical cleanup that must always execute
Keep Finally blocks simple and fast

validation_rules: valuePath must reference a valid list/collection

GroupSteps.description: Organize related steps into logical groups

If.description: Conditional execution based on boolean expression
best_practices: Consider using Switch for multiple conditions

SetValues.description: Set variable values for use in test
validation_rules: Each namedValue must have name attribute
Variable names should follow naming conventions
best_practices: Use at beginning of test for test data

Sleep.description: Pause test execution for specified duration

Switch.description: Multi-way conditional branching (similar to switch/case in programming languages)

required_arguments.description: Expression to evaluate against case values

Switch.structure: Switch contains clause name='case' with steps containing multiple SwitchCase apiCalls
validation_rules: Must have at least one case
Individual cases are SwitchCase apiCalls within the case clause
best_practices: Use Switch instead of multiple If statements
Switch.note: Individual case/default clauses use apiId='com.provar.plugins.bundled.apis.SwitchCase' as separate apiCall elements within the case clause

SwitchCase.description: Individual case or default clause within a Switch statement (similar to 'case' keyword in programming)

required_arguments.description: Value to match against Switch value (omitted or empty for default case)

optional_arguments.description: Internal flag indicating if a previous case matched
Internal reference to parent Switch value

validation_rules: Must be child of Switch step's case clause
Default case has empty or no value argument
Multiple SwitchCase elements can exist within same Switch
best_practices: Order cases from most to least likely
SwitchCase.structure_example: Switch > clause name='case' > steps > SwitchCase (with clause name='steps' containing substeps)

optional_arguments.description: Maximum loop iterations to prevent infinite loops

validation_rules: Should have maxIterations to prevent infinite loops
best_practices: Ensure condition will eventually become false

DbConnect.description: Connect to external database (Oracle, SQL Server, DB2, MySQL, PostgreSQL)

validation_rules: Should have whereClause to avoid deleting all records

best_practices: Use WHERE clause to limit results

WebConnect.description: Connect to REST API or web service

required_arguments.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH)

validation_rules: method must be valid HTTP method
operation must be valid SOAP operation
best_practices: Use REST instead of SOAP when possible

Design.description: BDD (Behavior-Driven Development) steps for Gherkin-style test organization

Given.description: BDD Given step - set up preconditions
validation_rules: Should be first BDD step in scenario
Description should start with present tense
best_practices: Use for test setup and preconditions
Focus on system state, not actions
One When per scenario when possible
Each Then should verify one concept

And.description: BDD And connector - additional steps of same type
validation_rules: Should follow Given, When, or Then
best_practices: Use to add additional steps of same type
Consider breaking into separate scenarios if too many Ands

But.description: BDD But connector - contrasting additional steps
validation_rules: Should follow Given, When, or Then
best_practices: Use for negative assertions or exceptions

ActualResult.description: Document actual test result for manual review (Design phase step)
best_practices: Helpful for test case design phase

DesignStep.description: Placeholder step for test case design phase
validation_rules: Should be replaced with actual implementation
best_practices: Replace with actual steps before execution

ProvarAI.description: AI-powered testing capabilities including Agentforce and test data generation

validation_rules: agentId must be valid GUID format
best_practices: Create session at start of agent testing
Store session ID for subsequent conversations

AIAgentConversation.description: Send message to AI agent and receive response
validation_rules: message should be meaningful test input
best_practices: Use in ForEach for multiple messages

GenerateUtterance.description: Generate AI-powered test utterances for intent testing

IntentValidator.description: Validate that utterance matches expected intent

required_arguments.description: Type of data to generate (email, name, address, etc.)

optional_arguments.description: Number of data items to generate

validation_rules: imagePath must be valid file path

GenerateTestCase.description: AI-powered test case generation from scenario

required_arguments.description: Variable to store generated test case

validation_rules: scenario should be clear and detailed
best_practices: Provide detailed scenarios for better results

PageObjectCleaner.description: Clean up and optimize page object models
best_practices: Run periodically to maintain page objects

Salesforce.description: Salesforce-specific operations including Apex API, SOQL, and SF-specific features

optional_arguments.description: Automatically delete created objects after test

validation_rules: Should be first step when using Apex API
If autoCleanup=true, enableObjectIdLogging must be true
best_practices: Set autoCleanup=true unless manual cleanup required

required_arguments.description: Variable to store created object ID

validation_rules: objectType must be valid SF object
best_practices: Store result ID for later use

validation_rules: objectId must be valid 15 or 18 character SF ID

best_practices: Delete in Finally block for reliability

validation_rules: SOQL must have SELECT and FROM clauses
best_practices: Always select Id and Name fields
Use WHERE clause to limit results
Use ORDER BY for predictable results

validation_rules: apexBlock must be valid Apex syntax
best_practices: Use for complex operations not available via API
Test Apex code in Developer Console first

validation_rules: operation must be valid bulk operation
records must be valid for operation
best_practices: Use for large data volumes (> 200 records)

validation_rules: convertedStatus must be valid lead status

ExtractSalesforceLayout.description: Extract Salesforce page layout for comparison

AssertSalesforceLayout.description: Assert Salesforce page layout matches expected
validation_rules: dataUrl must point to valid layout file

LogForCleanup.description: Log SOQL query results for cleanup

required_arguments.description: SOQL query to select records for cleanup

validation_rules: Must have ApexConnect first with enableObjectIdLogging=true
Use ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 1 for latest record
best_practices: Use with ORDER BY for predictable cleanup

UI.description: User interface automation steps for Salesforce and web applications

UiConnect.description: Connect to Salesforce UI or web application

MSDynamics365Connect.description: Connect to a Microsoft Dynamics 365 application via the NitroX connector. Use INSTEAD of UiConnect when targeting Microsoft Dynamics 365.

required_arguments.description: Provar connection profile name configured for the Dynamics 365 environment
Variable name that downstream UI steps reference via uiConnectionName
Dynamics 365 app to open after sign-in (e.g., 'Sales Hub', 'Customer Service Hub'). May be left empty if declared as a runtime-bound <apiParam name="appName"> in <generatedParameters>.

validation_rules: Use INSTEAD of UiConnect/ApexConnect for Microsoft Dynamics 365 targets
resultName is required so downstream UI steps can set uiConnectionName
appName must be populated OR declared as a runtime parameter in <generatedParameters> (data-driven pattern)
best_practices: Set appName to the target model-driven app to land directly on the right surface
Declare appName in <generatedParameters> when the value is supplied at runtime

MSDataverseConnect.description: Connect to a Microsoft Dataverse environment via the NitroX connector. Use INSTEAD of UiConnect when targeting Microsoft Dataverse.

required_arguments.description: Provar connection profile name configured for the Dataverse environment
Variable name that downstream UI steps reference via uiConnectionName

validation_rules: Use INSTEAD of UiConnect/ApexConnect for Microsoft Dataverse targets
resultName is required so downstream UI steps can set uiConnectionName
Has no variant-specific arguments; <generatedParameters/> stays empty
best_practices: Reuse the connection across the test rather than reconnecting

MSPowerAppConnect.description: Connect to a Microsoft Power App via the NitroX connector. Use INSTEAD of UiConnect when targeting Microsoft Power Apps.

required_arguments.description: Provar connection profile name configured for the Power Apps tenant
Variable name that downstream UI steps reference via uiConnectionName
Display name of the target Power App. May be left empty if declared as a runtime-bound <apiParam name="powerAppName"> in <generatedParameters>.

validation_rules: Use INSTEAD of UiConnect/ApexConnect for Microsoft Power Apps targets
resultName is required so downstream UI steps can set uiConnectionName
powerAppName must be populated OR declared as a runtime parameter in <generatedParameters> (data-driven pattern)
best_practices: Set powerAppName to the exact display name from the Power Apps maker portal
Declare powerAppName in <generatedParameters> when the value is supplied at runtime

MSPowerPageConnect.description: Connect to a Microsoft Power Page via the NitroX connector. Use INSTEAD of UiConnect when targeting Microsoft Power Pages.

required_arguments.description: Provar connection profile name configured for the Power Pages tenant
Variable name that downstream UI steps reference via uiConnectionName
Power Platform environment that hosts the page. May be left empty if declared as a runtime-bound <apiParam name="environment"> in <generatedParameters>.
Display name of the target Power Page site. May be left empty if declared as a runtime-bound <apiParam name="powerPageName"> in <generatedParameters>.

validation_rules: Use INSTEAD of UiConnect/ApexConnect for Microsoft Power Pages targets
resultName is required so downstream UI steps can set uiConnectionName
environment and powerPageName must each be populated OR declared as runtime parameters in <generatedParameters>
best_practices: Set environment and powerPageName so the test lands on the right Power Page site
Declare environment / powerPageName in <generatedParameters> when supplied at runtime

UiWithScreen.description: Navigate to and interact with Salesforce screen

optional_arguments.description: Always for first screen, Dont for subsequent
Store record ID (required for New screens)
Record ID to edit/view (required for Edit/View screens when navigate=Always)

validation_rules: Edit/View screens with navigate=Always: must have sfUiTargetObjectId
best_practices: Store record IDs from New screens
Group related UI actions in substeps

UiDoAction.description: Perform UI action (click, set, select, etc.)
validation_rules: Lead Conversion buttons: MUST use name=submitConvert and action=submitConvert (NOT Convert, ConvertButton, or action=convert)
Dialog fields (e.g., OpportunityName): MUST bind to the TARGET object (object=Opportunity with field=name, NOT object=Lead with field=OpportunityName)

locator_format.description: uiLocator URI format for UiDoAction steps

dialog_fields.note: Dialog fields reference the TARGET object being created, not the source object

UiAssert.description: Assert UI element state or value
validation_rules: Date/time: use Contains or EqualTo based on format
best_practices: Format values to match UI display

validation_rules: Use for non-Salesforce sites or direct URLs
best_practices: Wait for page load after navigation

validation_rules: Field names must match form fields
action must be valid (Accept, Dismiss, GetText)
best_practices: Use in Try/Catch for optional alerts

Utility.description: String manipulation, list operations, and file I/O utilities

validation_rules: dataUrl must be valid file path
File must exist and be readable
valuesRange must be valid Excel range

optional_arguments.description: Replace all occurrences vs first only

validation_rules: pattern must be valid regex if isRegex=true

best_practices: Compare sorted lists for order-independent comparison

value_types.description: Standard value class types used in Provar test steps. Based on corpus analysis of 329,424 value elements across 1,451 test files.

_valid_class_values.description: Complete list of valid 'class' attribute values for <value> elements

_valid_valueClass_values.description: Complete list of valid 'valueClass' attribute values when class='value'

common_patterns.description: Common test case patterns and best practices

apex_crud_pattern.description: Standard Salesforce Apex CRUD operation pattern

steps.purpose: Perform CRUD operation, store result ID

ui_interaction_pattern.description: Standard UI interaction and verification pattern
best_practices: Store record IDs from New screens

data_driven_pattern.description: Data-driven testing with external data files
best_practices: Use Read to load test data

agentforce_conversation_pattern.description: Agentforce AI agent conversation testing pattern

steps.purpose: Connect to Salesforce for record validation
Create agent session, store session ID

callable_test_case_pattern.description: Calling reusable test cases with caseCall element

caseCall_element.description: Reference to another test case to execute

required_attributes.name: testCaseId
required_attributes.description: GUID of the callable test case

optional_attributes.name: guid
optional_attributes.description: Unique GUID for this call instance

callable_test_requirements.description: Test case being called must have visibility='Internal' or visibility='Callable'
callable_test_requirements.note: Public tests cannot be called from other tests

best_practices: Use for reusable test logic (setup, cleanup, common flows)
Pass parameters using <argument> elements if test has <params>
validation_rules: testCaseId must match an existing test case GUID
testCasePath must be valid relative path
Called test must have visibility='Internal' or visibility='Callable'
Parameter types must match called test signature

parameterized_test_pattern.description: Test case with input parameters for reusability

params_section.description: Define test case parameters in <params> element

args_section.note: Arguments can be overridden when calling the test via caseCall

best_practices: One When per scenario when possible
Focus Given on state, not actions
